description_long: This is a stylized, retro-futuristic school bus with a rounded, streamlined body painted in a muted green color. The bus features large, rectangular side windows with black trim, and a series of mechanical and pipe-like attachments on the front and sides, giving it a slightly industrial, sci-fi appearance. The wheels are black with metallic hubcaps, and the bus has two large, pod-like structures mounted on each side, possibly representing futuristic propulsion or storage units. The front of the bus is characterized by a wide, chrome horizontal grille, dual headlights, and additional mechanical details such as pipes and gauges. Along the sides, there is a light gray panel with Japanese text, adding to its unique, urban aesthetic. The roof is gently curved, and the rear is simple with minimal detailing and a few small windows.
description: A retro-futuristic green school bus with large side windows, mechanical attachments, and pod-like side structures, featuring Japanese text panels and a chrome front grille.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bus, large windows, side pods, and Japanese text panel.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the curved back, small rear windows, and the pod structures extending from the sides.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible mechanical attachments near the front and the same window and pod arrangement.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the wide chrome grille, dual headlights, and prominent mechanical details on the left side.
attribute_school_bus_signage: Gray horizontal panel with Japanese text on both sides of the bus, using a simple sans-serif font in dark color; no traditional 'SCHOOL BUS' signage or yellow color present.
attribute_front_grille_design: Wide, rectangular chrome grille with multiple horizontal slats, spanning most of the front width below the headlights; no emblems or additional markings.
attribute_window_arrangement: Seven large, rectangular side windows per side, evenly spaced with black trim; one smaller driver window at the front; no visible emergency exit windows.
